ddls:
CREATE TABLE "workouts" (
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workout session */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the workout */,
  "date_workout" TEXT /* Date when the workout was performed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the workout in minutes */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered during the workout */,
  "calories_burned" INTEGER /* Calories burned during the workout */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text description of the workout */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date and time when the workout was added to the system */,
  "workout_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workouts_workout_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_type_id") REFERENCES workout_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workouts_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password for the user's account */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., User, Trainer, Administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the profile */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in centimeters */,
  "fitness_goal" TEXT /* Fitness goal of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout session for which the feedback is given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user for the workout session */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user for the workout session */,
  "date_provided" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_workout_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_id") REFERENCES workouts ("workout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workout_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workout type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the workout type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workout type */,
  "intensity_level" TEXT /* Intensity level of the workout type (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitness goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the goal */,
  "goal_name" TEXT /* Name of the fitness goal */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the goal */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the goal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "target_weight" REAL /* Target weight for the goal */,
  "target_body_fat" REAL /* Target body fat percentage for the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenges" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitness challenge */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the challenge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the challenge */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the challenge */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the challenge */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the challenge (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward for completing the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenge_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant in a challenge */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge the user is participating in */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the challenge */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the user's participation in the challenge */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the user's participation in the challenge */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's participation in the challenge (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "progress" INTEGER /* Progress of the user in the challenge (e.g., percentage completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_participants_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "friendships" (
  "friendship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friendship */,
  "user_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first user in the friendship */,
  "user_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second user in the friendship */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the friendship (e.g., Pending, Accepted) */,
  "friendship_date" TEXT /* Date when the friendship was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("friendship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendships_user_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id1") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendships_user_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id2") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the achievement */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "date_earned" TEXT /* Date when the achievement was earned */,
  "badge" TEXT /* Badge associated with the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed (e.g., Login, Logout, Workout) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the activity (e.g., Mobile, Web) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., Unread, Read) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Friend request, Challenge invitation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "badge_description" TEXT /* Description of the badge */,
  "date_earned" TEXT /* Date when the badge was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workout_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workout plan */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer who created the plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the workout plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the workout plan */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the workout plan (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_plans_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workout_plan_workouts" (
  "plan_workout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workout in a plan */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout plan */,
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the week for the workout (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the workout in the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_workout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_plan_workouts_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES workout_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_plan_workouts_workout_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_id") REFERENCES workouts ("workout_id")
)
